recommendations.title: "Wuthering Heights"
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

recommendations.title: Foxtrot
recommendations.overview: A troubled family must face facts when tragedy strikes their son's desolate military post.

recommendations.title: Till Death
recommendations.overview: After a romantic evening at their secluded lake house, a woman wakes up handcuffed to her dead husband. Trapped and isolated in the dead of winter, she must fight off hired killers to escape her late spouse's twisted plan.

recommendations.title: Arctic Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: A massive influx of glacial melting triggers a new ice age in the Northern Hemisphere, forcing a family to make their way across the ice-covered landscape before they are frozen out for good.

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.overview: Following an unexpected tragedy, child psychologist Malcolm Crowe meets a nine year old boy named Cole Sear, who is hiding a dark secret.

recommendations.title: The Eyes of My Mother
recommendations.overview: A young, lonely woman is consumed by her deepest and darkest desires after tragedy strikes her quiet country life.

recommendations.title: Maborosi
recommendations.overview: A tragedy strikes a young woman's life without warning or reason. She continues living while searching for meaning in a lonely world.

recommendations.title: Bird
recommendations.overview: 12-year-old Bailey lives with her single dad Bug and brother Hunter in a squat in North Kent. Bug doesn’t have much time for his kids, and Bailey, who is approaching puberty, seeks attention and adventure elsewhere.

recommendations.title: Iceman
recommendations.overview: A  team of Arctic researchers find a 40,000 year-old man frozen in ice and bring him back to life. Anthropologist Dr. Stanley Shephard wants to befriend the Iceman and learn about the man's past while Dr. Diane Brady and her surgical team want to dis

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead: A Light in Darkness
recommendations.overview: Pastor Dave responds to the unimaginable tragedy of having his church, located on the grounds of the local university, burned down.
